title: Oeceoclades ambongensis
taxonomy: Oeceoclades ambongensis is a species within the genus Oeceoclades, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, and Orchidaceae is one of the most diverse and widespread plant families in the world. Oeceoclades ambongensis is also a member of the larger group known as monocots, characterized by having one cotyledon in their seeds. At the kingdom level, Oeceoclades ambongensis falls under Plantae, which encompasses all plant species. The classification of Oeceoclades ambongensis reflects its unique evolutionary history and adaptations to its environment.
